search:spring-data-jpa-security:securing.content:
- Use `@EnableJpaRepositories` to activate Spring Data JPA repositories.
- Configure the base package in `@EnableJpaRepositories` if needed.
- JpaRepository extends PagingAndSortingRepository, which extends CrudRepository.
- Key CRUD operations are provided by JpaRepository.
- For pagination and sorting, use methods like `findAll(Pageable pageable)` in JpaRepository.
- Ensure your entity classes are annotated with JPA annotations like `@Entity`, `@Id`, etc.
- Use Spring Boot's auto-configuration for JPA repositories.
- Check the latest version of Spring Data JPA on [Maven Central](https://search.maven.org/artifact/org.springframework.data/spring-data-jpa).
- Configure data source properties in `application.properties` or `application.yml`.
